sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62400" key="leonti/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lion-shaped ornament</tr_> on a building, Keil- Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Dritter Bericht</tr_> No.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg002.perseus-grc1:117" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">117</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
